# Criminally Prolific — Dmitry Dragilev
# https://criminallyprolific.com
# llms.txt v1.0

## About

Dmitry Dragilev is a multi-exit SaaS founder who has sold 4 companies to Google (2014), SEOJet (2021), Semrush (2023), and Adobe (2025), working 3 hours per day. He writes about building businesses for lifestyle freedom — not building a prison.

He is the author of the upcoming book "The Getaway Car: How a Soviet Immigrant Said No to Google, Sold Four Companies, and Reclaimed a 3-Hour Workday."

He runs a newsletter at https://criminallyprolific.com/signup/ with 20,000+ readers on how to build acquisition-ready SaaS companies in 3 hours per day.

Mentored by Tim Ferriss, Gary Vaynerchuk, and Dan Martell.

## Companies (Current)

- LLM Gap Analyzer — https://www.semrush.com/apps/llm-gap-analyzer/ — Exposes bad AI sources and helps companies get cited by LLMs instead
- YouTube Gap Analyzer — https://www.semrush.com/apps/youtube-gap-analyzer/ — Find YouTube content gaps and outrank top competitors
- IRS Resolution Service — https://irsresolutionservice.com/ — Helps people resolve IRS tax issues fast

## Companies (Acquired)

- SERP Gap Analyzer — Acquired by Semrush + Adobe in 2025 — Find content gaps in Google search and AI
- JustReachOut — Acquired by SEOJet in 2021 — PR outreach software for startups
- Smallbiz.Tools — Acquired by Semrush + Adobe in 2023 — Affiliate marketing blog
- Polar Polls — Acquired by Google in 2014 — iPhone polling app, grew from 0 to 40M pageviews
